description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features large glass windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop green space. The house is set on a rectangular lot with a combination of paved driveway, wooden deck, and landscaped areas, including a swimming pool and outdoor seating. The structure incorporates a mix of materials such as concrete, glass, and wood, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. There are several entry points, including a main entrance with steps and a covered carport. The property is surrounded by a few trees, enhancing its integration with the environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and a pool, set on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large glass windows, and two balconies with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, outdoor pool, and a staircase leading to the upper balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, pool, and large glass facade facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, outdoor seating area, and the integration of balconies and rooftop garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a modern door integrated into a glass facade
